'''Robbie Storey''' (born 21 October 1999) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|ce}} for the [[Townsville Blackhawks]] in the [[Queensland Cup]], after playing for the [[London Broncos]] in the [[Super League]] the year before.

He has previously played for [[AS Carcassonne]] in the [[Elite One Championship]], the [[Dewsbury Rams]] and [[Keighley Cougars]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]] as well as previously playing for [[Doncaster RLFC|Doncaster]] in [[2022 RFL League 1|League 1]].

==Background==
Storey was born in [[Kingston upon Hull, East Riding of Yorkshire]], England.

He was in the [[Castleford Tigers]] academy system.<ref>[https://keighleycougars.uk/robbie-storey-2024 ROBBIE STOREY TO JOIN THE PRIDE]</ref> He played [[rugby union]] as a [[Rugby union positions#Wing|winger]] for [[Hull Ionians]].<ref>[https://www.hullionians.co.uk/teams/7283/player/robbiestorey-2814271 Hull Ionians profile]</ref>

==Playing career==
===Carcassonne===
Storey played for [[Carcassonne XIII]] in the [[Elite One Championship]] during the [[Elite One Championship 2020–2021|2020–2021 season]].<ref>[https://www.intrl.sport/news/try-of-the-year/ TRY OF THE YEAR]</ref>

===Dewsbury Rams===
He joined the [[Dewsbury Rams]] ahead of the [[2021 RFL Championship]] season.<ref>[https://www.dewsburyreporter.co.uk/sport/other-sport/dewsbury-rams-sign-former-castleford-tigers-player-3289521 Dewsbury Rams sign former Castleford Tigers player]</ref>

===Doncaster===
Storey played for [[Doncaster RLFC|Doncaster]] in the [[2022 RFL League 1]] season.<ref>[https://www.thetelegraphandargus.co.uk/sport/23020105.keighley-cougars-sign-robbie-storey-doncaster/ Keighley Cougars sign Robbie Storey from Doncaster]</ref>

===Keighley Cougars===
He played for the [[Keighley Cougars]] in the [[2023 RFL Championship]] season.<ref>[https://keighleycougars.uk/statement-robbie-storey NSTATEMENT: ROBBIE STOREY]</ref>

===London Broncos===
Storey joined the [[London Broncos]] ahead of the [[2024 Super League season]].<ref>[https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/london-broncos-tie-down-key-man-for-2024-international-ace-at-home-in-the-capital London Broncos tie down key man for 2024; International ace ‘at home’ in the capital]</ref>

===Townsville Blackhawks===
On 6 January 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[Townsville Blackhawks]] in the [[Queensland Cup]]<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=6 Jan 2025|author=Callum Walker|title=London Broncos centre Robbie Storey makes move following club’s Super League relegation|url=https://www.totalrl.com/london-broncos-centre-robbie-storey-makes-move-following-clubs-super-league-relegation/}}</ref>
